title: CyberNinja
description: An action and build-crafting mod that allows you to become a cyber ninja who fights stylishly with gadgets and skills.
body:
## Overview
MineNinja transforms Minecraft into a high-speed cyber-ninja action experience. Player can move with action abilities, combine cyber gadgets with ancient ninja arts, and develop your own unique fighting style.

## Features
Ninja weapons: Katana, Shuriken, Chain Sickle, Smoke Bomb, and Ninja Suit!

Ninja Action System: Sliding, double jumps, and wall jump!

Customizable Combat Arts: Mix and match special armor trims to create your own combat style

Skill Progression System: Defeat enemy ninjas to obtain new abilities and cyber-gadgets

Ninja Enemy: Challenge cyber ninja illager spawning in raid

## Basic Action Skills
- Wall-running & Wall-jump
- Double jump
- Sliding (and Air-Sliding!): Sneak and sprint when equip ninja suit

## Optional Action Skills
You can trimming armor or weapon and use optional action skills
- Hook shot: chain sickle can use as hookshot 
- Air Rocket: double jump but like rocket
- Heavy Air Jump: stronger double jump
- Heavy fall: yourself become mace.
- Mirror, Vanish, Mirage, Shadow lark: can summon illusion
and more! (and add more future updates)

## Credit
CKenJa: Plan & Program

Baguchi: Plan & Program & Texture

Jowan: Texture

This mod is an alpha version currently under development. It is missing some elements, and most importantly, it may not be that stylish. Please understand.
Made for ModFest 1.21
